sections.title: Had To / Will Have To — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Had To / Will Have To — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Had To / Will Have To is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + had to (past obligation) / will have to (future obligation) + base verb. Rules: 'Had to' is the past tense of has to/have to — same form for all subjects | 'Will have to' expresses future obligation — same form for all subjects | Negative past: did not have to; Negative future: will not have to | Question: Did + subject + have to...? / Will + subject + have to...?
sections.formula: Subject + had to (past obligation) / will have to (future obligation) + base verb

examples.english: I had to go to office yesterday.
I will have to go to office tomorrow.

examples.hindi: उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ा।
examples.english: He had to complete this work.

examples.hindi: उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ेगा।
examples.english: He will have to complete this work.

examples.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ा।
examples.english: We had to follow the rules.

examples.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ेगा।
examples.english: We will have to follow the rules.

sections.title: Had To / Will Have To — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Had To / Will Have To — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Had To / Will Have To for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + had to (past obligation) / will have to (future obligation) + base verb

examples.english: She had to wake up early every day.
She will have to wake up early every day.
Did you have to do this?
Will you have to do this?
He had to work very hard.
He will have to work very hard.

sections.title: Had To / Will Have To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Had To / Will Have To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Had To / Will Have To in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + had to (past obligation) / will have to (future obligation) + base verb

examples.english: I had to pay money.
I will have to pay money.
We had to fill the form.
We will have to fill the form.

sections.title: Had To / Will Have To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Had To / Will Have To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Had To / Will Have To. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + had to (past obligation) / will have to (future obligation) + base verb

examples.english: You did not have to do this.
You will not have to do this.
She had to give proof.
She will have to give proof.
